Makes the exclude-patterns preview clearer.

## Fixed

- **The exclude-patterns preview no longer shows BombVault's internal restic path.** (#38, thanks @BaukeZwart) When you typed a container path (e.g. `/config`), the live preview showed the rebased internal path it maps to (e.g. `/host/user/user/appdata/<name>`), which looks like an invalid Unraid path and was confusing. The preview now shows a plain `✓ will be excluded from the backup` for a matching line (or a warning when a line would exclude nothing); the exact restic pattern is still available on hover. The matching itself is unchanged, only how it's shown.

---
